attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway specialist who moves early in stages, hunting bonus seconds and time gaps rather than late-race attacks. Targets intermediate sprints and long-range moves 28+ km from finish.
team_tactics: BORA deploys him tactically in breakaways even when positioned as GC domestique, prioritizing stage-specific opportunities over pure team protection. Willing to sacrifice traditional support roles for strategic advantages.
terrain_preference: Rolling terrain and time-trial-suited profiles where power endurance matters more than explosive climbing. Final climbs from breakaway position rather than GC group duels.
vulnerability: Traditional GC racing scenarios where late-climb explosiveness required. Relies on time gaps built from breakaways rather than head-to-head climbing superiority.
key_patterns: Breakaway specialist across Grand Tours, using long-range moves for GC gains (2 observations)
Bonus second hunter: targets intermediate sprints even when close on GC (2 observations)
Strong time-trialing ability on rolling terrain delivers results from breaks (2 observations)
Team grants autonomy for opportunistic racing over traditional domestique duties (2 observations)
form_trajectory: positive: Successfully translated breakaway tactics into genuine GC threat positions across both Giro and Tour 2022
